title: The 5-7-5 Girl
overview: Cherry blossoms bloom / as a pair of brand-new friends / write some poetry.

title: Nanako's Diet
overview: Eiji's big sister / girl with the petal pink hair / appears on the scene … and then … Nanako diets / for the sake of a person / whom she will not name

title: Let's Go to the Amusement Park
overview: club president skips / her club's amusement park trip / hoping sparks will fly

title: The Canvas Girl
overview: girl with a sketch pad / has trouble with expressions / so speaks through her art

title: The Fortune Teller Girl
overview: the fortune teller / (if she can spell your name right) / will divine your fate

title: Nanako's Rebellious Phase
overview: Eiji's pet rabbit / has a disgusting habit / (like, it's REALLY gross)

title: Nanako and the Seven Wonders of the Rain
overview: rainy day blues? no! / Nanako believes in the / Umbrella of Love

title: If Nanako Wore a Swimsuit
overview: it is summertime / and therefore swimsuit season; / the girls go shopping!

title: Eiji and Nanako's Dad
overview: Nanako's father / knows all of her expressions / ...wait, what's this new one?!

title: Nanako, Fireflies, and a Test of Courage
overview: she wants to go see / the fireflies in the woods / but ghosts? NOPE. NO THANKS

title: Watching the Fireworks with You
overview: fire flowers bloom / two young hearts stroll together / love is in the air

title: Nanako and Eiji
overview: the pair met by chance / and their lives changed forever / thanks to senryu
